scripts.dev:local: npm run sync:public && node scripts/free-dev-ports.mjs && concurrently -k -n backend,next -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix ../medusa-backend" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:9000/health && dotenv -e .env.local -v NEXT_PUBLIC_MEDUSA_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:9000 -- next dev --webpack"
scripts.dev:railway: npm run sync:public && dotenv -e .env.railway -e .env.railway.local -- next dev --webpack
